equation_progression.latex: Standing wave interference across the universe produces filaments with wavelength $\lambda$ = $\pi$ R\_universe / n, where R\_universe is the Hubble radius. For n of order unity, $\lambda$ $\approx$ 150 Mpc. These filaments are flux tubes with T² topology; the predicted cosmic web spacing matches observations.
Network topology: treat it as a graph 𝐺=(𝑉,𝐸) G=(V,E) where 𝑉 V = node coordinates and 𝐸 E = ley lines between nodes.

derivation_layer.source_latex:
\tzpsection{Direct Equation Progression}
\begin{enumerate}[leftmargin=1.6em,itemsep=7pt,topsep=4pt]
\item \textbf{Canonical Relation}
\[
Φ = nΦ0 where Φ0 = ≈ 2.07 × 10−15 Wb (2)
\]
This relation is retained from the source-repair evidence for theory of it all trawin topology.

\item \textbf{Support Relation}
\[
Standing wave interference across the universe produces filaments with wavelength $\lambda$ = $\pi$ R\_universe / n, where R\_universe is the Hubble radius. For n of order unity, $\lambda$ $\approx$ 150 Mpc. These filaments are flux tubes with T² topology; the predicted cosmic web spacing matches observations.
\]
This relation is retained from the source-repair evidence for theory of it all trawin topology.

\item \textbf{Closure Relation}
\[
Network topology: treat it as a graph 𝐺=(𝑉,𝐸) G=(V,E) where 𝑉 V = node coordinates and 𝐸 E = ley lines between nodes.
\]
This relation is retained from the source-repair evidence for theory of it all trawin topology.

\item \textbf{Auxiliary Relation}
\[
3. Full \(T^{\mu\nu}_{\rm EM}\) (component expression to programmatically evaluate): \[ T^{\mu\nu}_{\rm EM} \;=\; \sum_{\alpha,\beta,\rho} g^{\mu\alpha}g^{\nu\beta}F_{\alpha\rho}F_{\beta}{}^{\rho}\;-\;\tfrac14 g^{\mu\nu} I. \] (Implement as index contractions; CAS will expand to explicit algebraic combinations of metric and derivatives of \(A\).)
\]
This relation is retained from the source-repair evidence for theory of it all trawin topology.

\item \textbf{Review Relation}
\[
\hat{H}_{\text{topo}} = \sum_{v \in \text{lattice}} A_v + \sum_{p \in \text{plaquette}} B_p
\]
This relation is retained from the source-repair evidence for theory of it all trawin topology.

\end{enumerate}

\tzpsection{Proof}
The proof route is review-conditioned: verify that the listed source equations are mutually admissible in the entry's TRAWIN-normalized frame.
